text.title: Clean Architecture Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing how arch-pattern-clean produces a valid spec artefact.

example.title: Happy-path application
example.code:
--- artefact_id: clean-layout-shop-2026-05-23 owner: Ruslan Faion <ruslan@faion.net> ---
# E-commerce Ordering — Clean Architecture Layout
## Ring 1 — Entities - `domain/order.py` — Order, LineItem, Money - `domain/customer.py` — Customer, ShippingAddress
## Ring 2 — Use Cases - `application/place_order.py` — PlaceOrderUseCase - `application/refund_order.py` — RefundOrderUseCase
## Ring 3 — Adapters - `adapters/http/order_controller.py` — HTTP controller calling use cases - `adapters/db/order_repository_impl.py` — implements domain port - `adapters/payment/stripe_gateway.py` — implements payment port
## Ring 4 — Frameworks - `infrastructure/fastapi_app.py` — server wiring - `infrastructure/sqlalchemy_engine.py` — DB engine + session factory
## Lint - Tool: importlinter - Contract: layered, layers = [infrastructure, adapters, application, domain]. - CI fails on inner-imports-outer violation.
example.note: Demonstrates the rules from 01-core-rules.xml applied to a concrete input; output validates against the schema in 02-output-contract.xml.
